item.title: Green BB Cream CHANGES To Match Your Skin Tone
item.description: I am testing out a viral green BB cream that claims to transform into your specific skin tone while neutralizing redness. Join me as I demonstrate the application on my hooded eyes and face, followed by a nine hour wear test in different lighting. I am sharing my honest professional thoughts on how it performs throughout a busy day.

media:content.media:title: Green BB Cream CHANGES To Match Your Skin Tone
media:content.media:description: I am testing out a viral green BB cream that claims to transform into your specific skin tone while neutralizing redness. Join me as I demonstrate the application on my hooded eyes and face, followed by a nine hour wear test in different lighting. I am sharing my honest professional thoughts on how it performs throughout a busy day.

item.title: Smokey EYE w/ Q-TIP!
item.description: I am showing you how to achieve a perfectly blended smokey eye using a simple q tip. This technique is designed specifically for hooded eyes to ensure a soft and seamless finish without the need for high end tools. Follow my professional guide to master this look with ease.

media:content.media:title: Smokey EYE w/ Q-TIP!
media:content.media:description: I am showing you how to achieve a perfectly blended smokey eye using a simple q tip. This technique is designed specifically for hooded eyes to ensure a soft and seamless finish without the need for high end tools. Follow my professional guide to master this look with ease.

item.title: How To Perfect Winged Eyeliner
item.description: I am showing you my professional method for achieving a sharp and symmetrical winged eyeliner every single time. This step by step tutorial focuses on the specific placement needed for hooded lids to ensure your liner looks polished and intentional. Let us perfect this classic look together.

media:content.media:title: How To Perfect Winged Eyeliner
media:content.media:description: I am showing you my professional method for achieving a sharp and symmetrical winged eyeliner every single time. This step by step tutorial focuses on the specific placement needed for hooded lids to ensure your liner looks polished and intentional. Let us perfect this classic look together.

item.title: This Graphic Eyeliner Look Is EYEconic!
item.description: I am sharing my professional secrets for mastering a bold graphic eyeliner that stays visible even on hooded eyes. Precision is key to this artistic style, and I will show you exactly how to map out the shape for a balanced and confident finish. Join me to elevate your eye makeup game.

media:content.media:title: This Graphic Eyeliner Look Is EYEconic!
media:content.media:description: I am sharing my professional secrets for mastering a bold graphic eyeliner that stays visible even on hooded eyes. Precision is key to this artistic style, and I will show you exactly how to map out the shape for a balanced and confident finish. Join me to elevate your eye makeup game.

item.title: Get to know me better! (Q&A)
item.description: I am opening up to answer your most asked questions about my journey in the beauty world. From my favorite techniques for hooded eyes to what drives my creativity, I am sharing the stories behind the looks. Join me for this personal look into my life and professional process.

media:content.media:title: Get to know me better! (Q&A)
media:content.media:description: I am opening up to answer your most asked questions about my journey in the beauty world. From my favorite techniques for hooded eyes to what drives my creativity, I am sharing the stories behind the looks. Join me for this personal look into my life and professional process.

item.title: Easiest smokey eye with a Q-Tip
item.description: I am showing you how to achieve a seamless smokey eye using a common household item. This technique is perfect for hooded eyes and ensures a soft, blended finish without the need for complex tools. Follow my step by step guide to master this professional look with ease.

media:content.media:title: Easiest smokey eye with a Q-Tip
media:content.media:description: I am showing you how to achieve a seamless smokey eye using a common household item. This technique is perfect for hooded eyes and ensures a soft, blended finish without the need for complex tools. Follow my step by step guide to master this professional look with ease.

item.title: This Smokey Eye Will Blow Your Mind!
item.description: I am showing you how to achieve a perfectly blended smokey eye that actually works for hooded lids. Using my signature techniques, we will focus on placement and precision to create a look that is both professional and flattering. Follow along as I break down every step for a confident finish.

media:content.media:title: This Smokey Eye Will Blow Your Mind!
media:content.media:description: I am showing you how to achieve a perfectly blended smokey eye that actually works for hooded lids. Using my signature techniques, we will focus on placement and precision to create a look that is both professional and flattering. Follow along as I break down every step for a confident finish.

item.title: "Eye Liner" Hack For Hooded Eyes!
item.description: Master the art of eyeliner with this precise technique tailored specifically for hooded eyes. Smitha Deepak demonstrates a step by step approach to ensure your liner remains visible and flattering. Perfect for achieving a polished, professional look with ease and confidence.

media:content.media:title: "Eye Liner" Hack For Hooded Eyes!
media:content.media:description: Master the art of eyeliner with this precise technique tailored specifically for hooded eyes. Smitha Deepak demonstrates a step by step approach to ensure your liner remains visible and flattering. Perfect for achieving a polished, professional look with ease and confidence.
